title: Infoblox IQ for Threat Defense Insight Data Connector via REST API
descriptionMarkdown: The Infoblox IQ for Threat Defense Insight Data Connector allows you to easily connect your Infoblox IQ for Threat Defense Insight data with Microsoft Sentinel. By connecting your logs to Microsoft Sentinel, you can take advantage of search & correlation, alerting, and threat intelligence enrichment for each log.
additionalRequirementBanner: This data connector depends on a parser based on a Kusto Function to work as expected called [**InfobloxInsight**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Infoblox/Parsers/InfobloxInsight.yaml) which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.

sampleQueries.description: Return all Insights involving DNS Tunneling
Return all Insights involving a configuration issue
sampleQueries.query:
InfobloxInsight_CL
| where name has "Configuration" or tostring(threat_properties) has "CONFIGURATION"

sampleQueries.description: Return count of critical severity insights
sampleQueries.query:
InfobloxInsight_CL
| where severity == "Critical"
| summarize dcount(insight_id) by severity

sampleQueries.description: Return count of Insights by status
Return each Insight by name (threat type)

dataTypes.name: InfobloxInsight_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
InfobloxInsight_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
InfobloxInsight_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(3d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required. [See the documentation to learn more about workspace keys](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-windows#obtain-workspace-id-and-key).

instructionSteps.title: Parsers
instructionSteps.description: >This data connector depends on a parser based on a Kusto Function to work as expected called [**InfobloxInsight**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Infoblox/Parsers/InfobloxInsight.yaml) which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.

instructionSteps.title: Infoblox IQ for Threat Defense
instructionSteps.description: >This data connector assumes you have access to Infoblox IQ for Threat Defense. You can find more information about it [**here**](https://docs.infoblox.com/space/BloxOneThreatDefense/2448392230/Infoblox+IQ+for+Threat+Defense).

instructionSteps.title: Follow the steps below to configure this data connector
1.  Generate an Infoblox API Key and copy it somewhere safe
instructionSteps.description: In the [Infoblox Cloud Services Portal](https://csp.infoblox.com/atlas/app/welcome), generate an API Key and copy it somewhere safe to use in the next step. You can find instructions on how to create API keys [**here**](https://docs.infoblox.com/space/BloxOneThreatDefense/230394187/How+Do+I+Create+an+API+Key%3F).

instructionSteps.title: 2.  Configure the Infoblox-IQ-for-TD-Get-Insights-API playbook
instructionSteps.description: Create and configure the **Infoblox-IQ-for-TD-Get-Insights-API** playbook which is deployed with this solution. Enter your Infoblox API key and the Log Analytics Workspace Name in the appropriate parameters when prompted.
